description_long: This bungalow features a broad, sloped red-tiled roof with a prominent glass greenhouse section on one side, and a large stone chimney at the center. The structure is surrounded by a low brick wall and a well-maintained green lawn, with a wooden porch extending along the front. The rear side includes a wooden deck, a small garden with raised beds, and a distinctive oversized red mushroom structure, likely decorative. Multiple large windows, including a greenhouse-style array, provide ample natural light to the interior. The building is primarily constructed from brick, wood, and glass, with detailed landscaping and outdoor seating areas.
description: A spacious, red-roofed bungalow with a greenhouse section, stone chimney, wooden porch, and landscaped garden areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide porch, central stone chimney, and large greenhouse window on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the steep roof pitch, greenhouse windows, and the decorative mushroom structure in the garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, garden beds, mushroom feature, and a variety of windows and outdoor seating.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the porch, roof details, and the back garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side windows and large greenhouse section
